briefdescription.para: Router callback for incoming heartbeat packets.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Heartbeat *hb, SYN_Router *router, SYN_HB_Peer *peers, uint8_t peer_cap, uint32_t interval_ms, uint32_t timeout_ms)
memberdef.name: syn_heartbeat_init

detaileddescription.para: Automatically registers a handler for SYN_MSG_HEARTBEAT on the router.

parameterdescription.para: How often to send our heartbeat.
How long before a peer is "dead".

simplesect.para: true if added, false if peer table is full.

briefdescription.para: Check if a specific peer is alive.

simplesect.para: true if the peer is alive.

briefdescription.para: Attach error log for peer-lost/found events.
